video_prompts:
# Scene 01 — The Canyon That Swallows the Poor

Episode: EP02 — The Golden Bridge and the Trembling Book

## Veo3.1 Prompt

Create a vertical 9:16 video, approximately 6-8s. Visual style: realistic/semi-photoreal Thai drama characters, high-end anime painted background environments: hand-painted 2D anime environment art with clean linework, soft painterly gradients, luminous cinematic light, atmospheric depth, detailed Thai-period locations and props, gentle haze, rich but natural colors, polished feature-film anime background finish; not a generic flat cartoon and not a 3D environment, cinematic emotional staging. Khram color continuity: Khram must appear in warm burnt-orange / amber-orange glass and outfit, clearly not blue or cyan.

Scene action: A massive canyon opens ahead. A broken road ends at the cliff edge while dust and wind swallow the view below.

Camera movement: begin with an establishing or medium shot that clearly shows the danger and social power imbalance, then slowly push in toward the most emotional face. Use one continuous dramatic camera move with no jumpy cuts.

Actor blocking and emotion: the characters move and react according to the scene action. Keep body language theatrical but believable: trembling hands, sharp pointing gestures, protective blocking, guilty glances, and tearful hesitation when appropriate.

Spoken dialogue in English, delivered with intense Thai-lakorn-style melodrama:
- Nin: “That gap is too wide. No one can cross it.”
- Khun Thongdaeng: “No one poor, perhaps.”
- Khun Phloeng: “A wide cliff does not make your heart larger.”

Sound: natural diegetic ambience only: water, wind, wood creaks, magical shimmer when relevant, breathing, footsteps, cloth movement, and emotional voice performance. No background music, no soundtrack, no BGM, no subtitles, no on-screen text, no watermark, no logo.
